item.title: Nancy Guthrie case: Kash Patel releases images, video of 'armed individual'
item.description: "We believe she is still alive. Bring her home," Savannah Guthrie responded.

item.title: Trump says his 'Great Ballroom' will be used for 'future Presidential Inaugurations'
item.description: President Donald Trump posted new drawings of his 'Great Ballroom' that he said would be "used for future Presidential Inaugurations."

item.title: WATCH: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads the Fifth in closed-door House Oversight deposition
item.description: Maxwell invoked the Fifth Amendment during the closed-door virtual deposition before the House Oversight Committee on Monday, according to video relea...

item.title: WATCH: FBI releases new video of individual outside Nancy Guthrie's home
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel released video of an "armed individual" in connection with the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, the 84-year-old mother of Savan...

item.title: WATCH: Patel releases images of potential subject in Nancy Guthrie disappearance case
